assets.purpose: Homepage hero slide 1: a premium USB-C essentials ecosystem scene for everyday connectivity.
assets.environment: White or very light gray wall with a minimal seamless surface.
assets.composition: Large empty text-safe space on the left half. Product ecosystem on the right half with one hero USB-C hub and 1-2 supporting accessories.

productHierarchy.hero: Slim satin aluminum USB-C hub angled to show useful connectivity.
supporting: One compact USB-C adapter placed lower and smaller.
One neatly curved USB-C cable connector as a quiet support object.

assets.extraDirection: Premium modern consumer tech product scene, minimal Apple Store style, clean white background, soft natural lighting, large empty space on LEFT for text overlay, product composition on RIGHT area, no text, no clutter, realistic materials, high-end commercial photography.

assets.purpose: Homepage hero slide 2: a calm desk-ready setup that communicates laptop expansion and organized workspace power.
assets.environment: Very light gray wall with a clean light wood desk surface.
assets.composition: Large empty text-safe space on the left half. Minimal workspace setup on the right half.

productHierarchy.hero: Compact docking station or USB-C hub as the dominant object on the desk.
supporting: One closed or partially visible silver laptop used only for context.
One slim monitor in the background only as requested context, soft and uncluttered.

assets.extraDirection: No keyboard, no mouse, no stationery, no cups. Monitor is allowed only for this desk setup. Keep the desk nearly empty and the product clearly dominant.

assets.extraDirection: No wall outlet required. Keep the image calm, high-end, and not catalog-like.
